import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut i = 0
    let n = parts.len()
    while i < n
      match parts.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          let sq = v * v
          if i == 0
            out = "#{sq}"
          else
            out = "#{out} #{sq}"
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
